political.s: Via parent company HASBRO: FEC: $137K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 8 executive donors.

charity.s: Via parent company HASBRO: $16M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.30% of revenue) via Hasbro Children's Fund.

environment.s: Via parent company HASBRO: Held by 1 ESG/SRI fund(s) (trillium) — investor-screen positive signal.

privacy.s: Via parent company HASBRO: Terms-of-service privacy grade E (very poor) via ToS;DR (tosdr.org), CC BY-SA 3.0 — transformed to TruNorth's scale.

execPay.s: Via parent company HASBRO: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 165:1 (median employee pay $113,241) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).

wiki.extract: FurReal Friends is a toy brand division of Hasbro and formerly of Tiger Electronics and Dreamright Toys created in 2002 focusing on robotic pets. FurReal toys widely vary in style and size, depicting different domesticated animals, dinosaurs, wild animals, and legendary creatures as robotic toys. They are usually small enough to be held, but have been manufactured large enough for children to sit on. Each furReal robotic toy moves to a degree.

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by Tiger Electronics. (Wikidata Q5509446)

health.s: Via parent company HASBRO: 17 CPSC recalls on record; sample hazard: choking.
